hero_p: Reliability, precision, and years of experience. We offer comprehensive foundry services, machining, and steel structures for B2B clients.
about_p: Prosz-Met has been operating on the market for many years, providing top quality metal processing services. Our experience and modern machinery allow us to execute the most demanding projects for B2B clients.
offer_card1_p: We perform precise turning, milling, and grinding of metal elements on modern CNC and conventional machines.
offer_card2_p: We design and manufacture durable metal containers and transport pallets tailored to the client's logistical specifications.
offer_card3_p: We provide specialized foundry and metallurgical services. We guarantee the highest quality of materials and timely execution.
park_p: Our company has a modern and diverse machine park, allowing for comprehensive execution of orders. We have both conventional and CNC machines.
gallery_p: See our selected implementations. These are examples of our capabilities and the quality of products we deliver to our clients.
contact_form_message: Describe what you need (dimensions, quantities, material)...
footer_about_p: We are a company with years of experience in the metal industry. We specialize in machining, foundry services, and steel structure production.
cookie_banner_text: This site uses cookies to ensure you get the best experience on our website. Learn more
